ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) HELEN LAI TAM. THE DEC-12-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
FEE FOR FIRST APPEARANCE FILED BY DEFENDANT TAM, HELEN LAI

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER OF DISCHARGE AND AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES' AND COSTS IS GRANTED. THE PLAINTIFF IS RELIEVED AS A PARTY UNDER THE COMPLAINT IN INTERPLEADER. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT FIDELITY SHALL BE AWARDED THE SUM OF $1,600 REPRESENTING ATTORNEY'S FEE AND THE SUM OF $883.00 FOR REIMBURSABLE COSTS FOR A TOTAL OF $2,483.00 WHICH SHALL BE DEDUCTED FROM THE $20,000 ON DEPOSIT WITH THE CLERK. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA, REPORTER: CONNIE J. PARCHMAN, CSR # 6137; JUDGE: PAUL ALVARADO, SITTING IN DEPT. 503.

NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ORDER DISCHARGE AND AWARD OF ATTYS' FES AND COSTS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR DEC-15-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LOX, MICHAEL
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-15-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, ON THE FIRST CALL OF THE MATTER, ATTY. LEW INFORMED THE COURT THAT AN AGREEMENT WAS REACHED BY THE PARTIES AND A STIPULATION AND ORDER WAS GIVEN TO THE CLERK EARLIER. THE COURT ASK COUNSEL WHETHER THE ORDER REFLECT THE TENTATIVE RULING OF THE COURT AND ATTY. LEW REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT IT DID. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER DISCHARGE AND AWARD OF ATTYS' FEES AND COSTS- ATTORNEY'S FEES OF $1,600 IS GRANTED PLUS COSTS OF $883.00. GRANT DISCHARGE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. THE MATTER WAS CALLED THE SECOND TIME. ATTY. LEW INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE ORDER SIGNED EARLIER DID NOT REFLECT THE TENTATIVE RULING OF THE COURT. THE COURT WITHDRAW THE ORDER SIGNED EARLIER. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 23, 2008 TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PAUL ALVARADO AT 9:30 A.M. IN HIS DEPARTMENT WHERE HE IS ASSIGNED THAT DATE. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

RULING- A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY'S Motion For Order of Discharge And Award Of Attorney Fees' And Costs IS GRANTED. THE PLAINTIFF IS RELIEVED AS A PARTY UNDER THE COMPLAINT IN INTERPLEADER. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT FIDELITY SHALL BE AWARDED THE SUM OF $1,600 REPRESENTING ATTORNEY'S FEE AND THE SUM OF $883.00 FOR REIMBURSABLE COSTS FOR A TOTAL OF $2,483.00 WHICH SHALL BE DEDUCTED FROM THE $20,000 ON DEPOSIT WITH THE CLERK. RULING - ON THE FIRST CALL OF THE MATTER, ATTY. LEW INFORMED THE COURT THAT AN AGREEMENT WAS REACHED BY THE PARTIES AND A STIPULATION AND ORDER WAS GIVEN TO THE CLERK EARLIER. THE COURT ASK COUNSEL WHETHER THE ORDER REFLECT THE TENTATIVE RULING OF THE COURT AND ATTY. LEW REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT IT DID. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY'S Motion For Order Discharge And Award Of Attys' Fees And Costs- ATTORNEY'S FEES OF $1,600 IS GRANTED PLUS COSTS OF $883.00.
